chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-161 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on M.A No.7948/2025 (Restoration) 24.10.2025 None is present for the applicant. No intimation has been received. It appears that applicant has lost interest to pursue the listed application. Accordingly, same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
